header.title: Opportunity Discovery
header.description: Find prompts where your brand is missing and competitors appear

types.missingDescription: Brand not cited, but competitors are
types.weakDescription: Brand cited but below competitor median

score.tooltip: Priority score (0-80) based on competitor density (50%) and platform breadth (30%), adjusted for gap type. Higher = more urgent.

detail.actionWeak: Optimize existing content for this prompt

empty.noMarket: Select a market to discover opportunities
empty.noMarketDescription: Choose a prompt set that represents the competitive category you want to analyse
empty.noBrand: Select a brand to discover opportunities
empty.noBrandDescription: Choose the brand you want to find visibility gaps for
empty.noDataDescription: Your brand appears in all tracked prompts, or no competitors are tracked yet
empty.noDataCta: Run models to generate opportunity data
empty.noPromptSetsDescription: Create a prompt set to define a competitive market for opportunity discovery

error.noAccess: You don't have access to this workspace's opportunities
error.noAccessDescription: Ask the workspace owner to grant you access
error.staleBrand: The selected market or brand no longer exists

aria.tableCaption: Opportunity discovery results showing prompts where your brand has visibility gaps
